Trancura9414001
Hydrometeorological time series for Trancura antes de Llafenco basin
hydroPSO-package
A flexible and model-independent Particle Swarm Optimisation (PSO) package for calibration/optimisation of environmental models
hydroPSO()
Enhanced Particle Swarm Optimisation algorithm
hydroPSO2pest()
Export hydroPSO input files to PEST
hydromod()
hydromod - Definition and execution of the model to be calibrated/optimised using an executable file that runs in the system console
hydromodInR()
hydromodInR
lhoat()
Latin-Hypercube One-factor-At-a-Time
params2ecdf()
Parameter values to empirical cumulative distribution functions
pest2hydroPSO()
Import PEST input files to hydroPSO
plot_2parOF()
Bivariate Parameter-Objective Function Diagnostic Plot for Hydrological Calibration
plot_NparOF()
Pairwise dotty plots of parameter interactions coloured by objective-function performance
plot_ParamsPerIter()
Plot parameter values against the iteration number
quant2ecdf()
From simulated ensembles to empirical cumulative distribution functions of selected quantiles
read_best()
Reading the 'BestParameterSet.txt' output file
ackley() griewank() rastrigin() rosenbrock() schafferF6() schwefel() sphere() sackley() sgriewank() srastrigin() srosenbrock() sschwefel1_2() ssphere()
